descriptions.1: Handcrafted by skilled artisans using traditional techniques, this ceramic vase features an organic, flowing form with a matte sandstone finish. Each piece is unique, making it a truly one-of-a-kind addition to your home.
descriptions.2: This beautifully woven rattan mirror brings natural warmth and texture to any wall. Its organic frame complements both modern and bohemian interiors with effortless style.
descriptions.3: Clean lines meet warm light in this minimalist table lamp. The brushed metal base and linen shade create a soft, ambient glow perfect for bedside tables or reading nooks.
descriptions.4: Bold yet balanced, this abstract canvas print adds a contemporary focal point to any room. Gallery-quality printing on premium cotton canvas with a solid wood frame.
descriptions.5: Hand-loomed from natural jute fibers, this rug adds earthy texture and warmth underfoot. Its neutral tone works beautifully in living rooms, bedrooms, and entryways.
descriptions.6: Scandinavian-inspired design meets exceptional comfort. This lounge chair features a solid wood frame, high-density foam cushioning, and premium upholstery built to last.
descriptions.7: This geometric gold shelf combines form and function, offering stylish display space for books, plants, and decor objects. Powder-coated iron with a brushed gold finish.
descriptions.8: Soft, breathable linen in a relaxed weave — this textured throw adds an effortless layer of comfort and style to sofas, beds, or reading chairs.
descriptions.9: Carved from genuine marble with natural veining, these bookends bring sculptural elegance to any shelf. Each pair is unique due to the natural stone.
descriptions.10: A classic terracotta pot with a modern matte finish. Perfect for succulents, herbs, or small indoor plants. Includes drainage hole and matching saucer.
descriptions.11: This statement floor lamp features a sweeping brass arc that extends over seating areas. An adjustable head directs warm light exactly where you need it.
descriptions.12: Plush velvet in a rich jewel tone, this accent pillow adds a luxurious tactile element to any seating arrangement. Hidden zipper closure with premium feather-down insert.
descriptions.13: A set of three clear glass cylinder vases in graduated heights. Perfect for fresh flowers, candles, or seasonal displays. Heavy-duty glass with polished rims.
descriptions.14: Organic ridges give this planter a handmade feel. Glazed interior keeps water from seeping, while the matte exterior adds subtle texture. Includes matching drip tray.
descriptions.15: Dried pampas grass stems in natural cream and tan hues. Lasts for years without water. Adds instant warmth and bohemian texture to any vase or arrangement.
descriptions.16: Make a statement with this dramatic full-length arched mirror. Aluminum alloy frame in matte black, wall-mountable or freestanding. Shatter-resistant glass.
descriptions.17: This sunburst mirror adds a burst of glamour to any wall. Metal rays finished in antique gold radiate from a central round mirror. Light and easy to hang.
descriptions.18: A sleek round mirror with thin brass rim — perfect as a vanity mirror or as a pair flanking a mantle. Floating-mount hardware creates a clean, modern look.
descriptions.19: Woven from natural rattan in a globe silhouette, this pendant casts beautiful patterned shadows across the room. Hardwired with adjustable cord length.
descriptions.20: Warm-white Edison LED bulbs on a weatherproof string — ideal for patios, bedrooms, or living rooms. 48 ft with 15 bulbs. Dimmable and energy-efficient.
descriptions.21: A matched pair of ceramic base table lamps with tapered linen shades. The crackle-glaze finish adds visual texture. Includes LED bulbs and three-way switch.
descriptions.22: Six black wooden frames in a mix of sizes ready to hang as a salon wall. Each frame includes a white mat. Gallery-quality glass with no-glare coating.
descriptions.23: Four botanical prints on archival paper — fern, eucalyptus, olive branch, and monstera. Subtle watercolor palette complements any neutral room. Unframed.
descriptions.24: A 24-inch metal wall clock with open-face Roman numerals. Quartz movement for silent operation. Aged-brass finish that develops a natural patina over time.
descriptions.25: A trio of continuous-line art prints on heavyweight matte paper. Abstract faces and figures in black ink. Modern, gallery-worthy, and easy to frame.
descriptions.26: A hand-tufted Moroccan-inspired rug with geometric diamond pattern in ivory and charcoal. Plush 0.5-inch pile. Non-slip backing for hard floors.
descriptions.27: A flat-woven wool runner in a subtle herringbone pattern. Durable enough for hallways and entryways. Reversible design for extended life.
descriptions.28: Ultra-soft faux sheepskin in a natural cream tone. Perfect as a throw rug, chair drape, or bedside mat. Machine washable for easy care.
descriptions.29: Tapered legs and a warm walnut finish give this side table mid-century appeal. Lower shelf provides extra storage. Solid rubberwood construction.
descriptions.30: A slim-profile console table in natural oak with two rattan-cane drawers. Ideal for entryways, hallways, or behind a sofa. Some assembly required.
descriptions.31: A set of three floating shelves in staggered lengths. Honeycomb core keeps them lightweight yet strong. Invisible bracket mounting for a clean line.
descriptions.32: Dual-purpose storage and seating — this ottoman opens to reveal a generous storage compartment. Linen-blend fabric with padded top and wooden feet.
descriptions.33: A lightweight cotton blanket in a classic waffle weave. Breathable for summer, layerable for winter. Pre-washed for lived-in softness from day one.
descriptions.34: Sleep on silk — a two-pack of mulberry-silk pillowcases that reduce friction on hair and skin. Hidden-zipper closure. Machine washable on delicate cycle.
descriptions.35: A hand-knotted cotton macrame wall hanging with a natural driftwood dowel. Adds instant bohemian texture to bedrooms, nurseries, or living rooms.
descriptions.36: A hand-knitted chunky throw in merino-wool blend. Oversized 50×70 inch dimensions drape beautifully over sofas and beds. Available in six neutral tones.
descriptions.37: Elevate your home organisation with this sleek 4-Hook Wall Mount Coat Rack. Featuring a sturdy black powder-coated metal base and four uniquely designed oval-shaped silver chrome hooks, this wall-mounted storage solution blends modern style with everyday practicality. Perfect for hanging coats, jackets, bags, keys, scarves, hats, towels, and more, this rack keeps your spaces clutter-free and stylish. The minimalist design complements any interior décor, from contemporary to traditional. Easy to install with pre-drilled mounting holes on both ends of the base, it offers a secure and permanent hanging solution for your entryway, bedroom, bathroom, or kitchen. Crafted from durable metal with a rust-resistant finish, this hook rack is built to last and maintain its polished appearance over time.

bullets: 4 OVAL CHROME HOOKS – Stylish oval-shaped silver chrome hooks offer generous hanging space for coats, jackets, bags, scarves, keys, and more, keeping your home neat and clutter-free
STURDY BLACK METAL BASE – The heavy-duty powder-coated black metal backplate ensures long-lasting durability and rust resistance, maintaining a polished look even with daily use
EASY WALL MOUNT INSTALLATION – Pre-drilled mounting holes on both ends of the base allow for quick and simple wall installation using standard screws (hardware included)
VERSATILE FOR ANY ROOM – Ideal for entryways, hallways, bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchens, and offices; keeps your everyday essentials organised and within easy reach
SPACE-SAVING DESIGN – Compact horizontal layout maximises wall space while providing multiple hanging points, making it perfect for small apartments, flats, or busy households
products.name: 4-Hook Wall Mount Coat Rack | Black Metal Base with Oval Silver Chrome Hooks | Wall Mounted Key Hanger for Entryway, Bedroom, Kitchen
